'''kodhagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:imaginative|imaginative]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-dh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imaginative|imaginative]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kodhagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kodhagithi|kodhagithi]] || [[word:kodhagiji|kodhagiji]] || [[word:kodhagishi|kodhagishi]] || [[word:kodhagiki|kodhagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kodhaguthuthu|kodhaguthuthu]] || [[word:kodhagujuju|kodhagujuju]] || [[word:kodhagushushu|kodhagushushu]] || [[word:kodhagukuku|kodhagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kodhaguthu|kodhaguthu]] || [[word:kodhaguju|kodhaguju]] || [[word:kodhagushu|kodhagushu]] || [[word:kodhaguku|kodhaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kodhagufthuf|kodhagufthuf]] || [[word:kodhagufjuf|kodhagufjuf]] || [[word:kodhagufshuf|kodhagufshuf]] || [[word:kodhagufkuf|kodhagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kodhagethe|kodhagethe]] || [[word:kodhageje|kodhageje]] || [[word:kodhageshe|kodhageshe]] || [[word:kodhageke|kodhageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kodhagothotho|kodhagothotho]] || [[word:kodhagojojo|kodhagojojo]] || [[word:kodhagoshosho|kodhagoshosho]] || [[word:kodhagokoko|kodhagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kodhagotho|kodhagotho]] || [[word:kodhagojo|kodhagojo]] || [[word:kodhagosho|kodhagosho]] || [[word:kodhagoko|kodhagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kodhagofthof|kodhagofthof]] || [[word:kodhagofjof|kodhagofjof]] || [[word:kodhagofshof|kodhagofshof]] || [[word:kodhagofkof|kodhagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kodhagïfthïf|kodhagïfthïf]] || [[word:kodhagïfjïf|kodhagïfjïf]] || [[word:kodhagïfshïf|kodhagïfshïf]] || [[word:kodhagïfkïf|kodhagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kodhagïfthïfthïf|kodhagïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:kodhagïfjïfjïf|kodhagïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:kodhagïfshïfshïf|kodhagïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:kodhagïfkïfkïf|kodhagïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kodhagïfthïf|kodhagïfthïf]] || [[word:kodhagïfjïf|kodhagïfjïf]] || [[word:kodhagïfshïf|kodhagïfshïf]] || [[word:kodhagïfkïf|kodhagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kodhagïfthïf|kodhagïfthïf]] || [[word:kodhagïfjïf|kodhagïfjïf]] || [[word:kodhagïfshïf|kodhagïfshïf]] || [[word:kodhagïfkïf|kodhagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kodhagæthæ|kodhagæthæ]] || [[word:kodhagæjæ|kodhagæjæ]] || [[word:kodhagæshæ|kodhagæshæ]] || [[word:kodhagækæ|kodhagækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kodhagathatha|kodhagathatha]] || [[word:kodhagajaja|kodhagajaja]] || [[word:kodhagashasha|kodhagashasha]] || [[word:kodhagakaka|kodhagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kodhagatha|kodhagatha]] || [[word:kodhagaja|kodhagaja]] || [[word:kodhagasha|kodhagasha]] || [[word:kodhagaka|kodhagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kodhagafthaf|kodhagafthaf]] || [[word:kodhagafjaf|kodhagafjaf]] || [[word:kodhagafshaf|kodhagafshaf]] || [[word:kodhagafkaf|kodhagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kodhagasha|kodhagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kodhagshësha|kodhagshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kodhagrosha|kodhagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kodhagmusha|kodhagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kodhagyasha|kodhagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokodhagnkshësha|gokodhagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokodhagnkrosha|gokodhagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokodhagnkmusha|gokodhagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokodhagnkyasha|gokodhagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kodhadhagasha|kodhadhagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kodhadhagshësha|kodhadhagshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kodhadhagrosha|kodhadhagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kodhadhagmusha|kodhadhagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kodhadhagyasha|kodhadhagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokodhadhagnkshësha|gokodhadhagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokodhadhagnkrosha|gokodhadhagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokodhadhagnkmusha|gokodhadhagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokodhadhagnkyasha|gokodhadhagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kedhægasha|kedhægasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kedhægshësha|kedhægshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kedhægrosha|kedhægrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kedhægmusha|kedhægmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kedhægyasha|kedhægyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokedhægnkshësha|gokedhægnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokedhægnkrosha|gokedhægnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokedhægnkmusha|gokedhægnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokedhægnkyasha|gokedhægnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kodhfagasha|kodhfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kodhfagshësha|kodhfagshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kodhfagrosha|kodhfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kodhfagmusha|kodhfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kodhfagyasha|kodhfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokodhfagnkshësha|gokodhfagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokodhfagnkrosha|gokodhfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokodhfagnkmusha|gokodhfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokodhfagnkyasha|gokodhfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
